title: Document setup instructions for applehv pre-release testing with Docker Desktop and Testcontainers
body:
### Feature request description

Currently instructions on how the get Podman Desktop 1.7.0 on Mac to work with applehv are spread over a number of issues and discussions, with information on using it as a drop-in replacement for `docker` in combination with `docker-compose` and Testcontainers being even more sparse.

In order to be able to test it, it would be very helpful to have them in one place.

### Suggest potential solution

Either copy or link https://gist.github.com/jfrantzius/0996e224cbe81d885553ece6f8abf99a#docker-compose-troubleshooting on the [Podman Desktop Wiki](https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/wiki) e.g. in a new section "Testing"

### Have you considered any alternatives?

_No response_

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body:
Interested in opening a PR?

This should be the default in podman 5.0
I'm not sure what a related PR would contain, and against which repo?

Ah, one learn every day!
https://gist.github.com/larrybotha/10650410

I'll create a PR
For the life of me I'm not able to fork and clone the Wiki https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/38796#discussioncomment-8259405 , sorry @rhatdan
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
